narrative:
Swancreek East One (precinct in Fulton County) has 833 registered voters, with 49.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a clear Republican lean of 8.0 percentage points.
